decoder_heading: Non-Personal Analysis of the Popularity of the Application Features
ident_heading: non personal analysis of the popularity of the application features
heading_content_part: non personal analysis of the popularity of the application features. Google analytic sdk for Android dont provide us any personal information about you and your device. Google analytic sdk for Android provide us information about users and its behaviour only in scope in manner like this: "100 users in particular city/country use this feature during yesterday" or "Today app has 100 more users then yesterday" etc. We don't share or transfer any analytics data that we have access with anybody. You can find more details about google analytic api on its Internet resources.
